code_value: Hello, I'm Cindy. I didn't become confident or outgoing until I met my English teacher, Miss Green. Thanks to her, I have changed a lot. Three years ago, I was pretty shy and quiet. I didn't dare to speak in front of the class. Miss Green encouraged me to stand up to answer her questions in class. One day I was asked to give a speech in front of the whole school. I was a little nervous before I gave the speech. Then I took a deep breath. Soon I became confident and started to give the speech. In the end, I heard the burst of cheers. I got such a strong feeling of pride when I saw the joy on Miss Green's face.

ets_th1 Which subject does Miss Green teach?</br>ets_th2 What was Cindy like three years ago?</br>ets_th3 What did Miss Green encourage Cindy to do in class?</br>ets_th4 How did Cindy feel before she gave a speech?
